query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(360014, 'What does "pneumatology" specifically study?', 'multiple_choice', '["The doctrine of Christ","The doctrine of the Holy Spirit","The doctrine of humanity","The doctrine of the church"]', 'The doctrine of the Holy Spirit', 1),
(360014, 'The Hebrew term ruach in Genesis 1:2 refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["The wind only","The Spirit of God hovering over creation","Human breath","An angelic being"]', 'The Spirit of God hovering over creation', 2),
(360014, 'In Joel 2:28-32, God promises to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Withdraw His Spirit","Pour out His Spirit on all flesh","Limit the Spirit to prophets only","End prophetic ministry"]', 'Pour out His Spirit on all flesh', 3),
(360014, 'The Greek term parakletos in John 14-16 means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Judge","Advocate/Helper/Comforter","Accuser","Stranger"]', 'Advocate/Helper/Comforter', 4),
(360014, 'Acts 2 records the fulfillment of:', 'multiple_choice', '["The promise of a new temple","Joel''s prophecy at Pentecost","The end of the Spirit''s work","The rejection of the Spirit"]', 'Joel''s prophecy at Pentecost', 5),
(360014, 'The filioque controversy concerns:', 'multiple_choice', '["The humanity of Christ","Whether the Spirit proceeds from the Father and the Son","The nature of baptism","The structure of the church"]', 'Whether the Spirit proceeds from the Father and the Son', 6),
(360014, 'According to Galatians 5:22-23, the fruit of the Spirit includes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Wealth, power, and fame","Love, joy, peace, patience, kindness","Anger, jealousy, and strife","Fear, doubt, and anxiety"]', 'Love, joy, peace, patience, kindness', 7),
(360014, 'The Spirit''s work in regeneration means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human self-improvement","The Spirit gives new spiritual life to believers","Believers earn salvation","The Spirit is passive in salvation"]', 'The Spirit gives new spiritual life to believers', 8),
(360014, 'Spiritual gifts (charismata) are given for:', 'multiple_choice', '["Personal glory","The edification of the church","Competition among believers","Individual entertainment"]', 'The edification of the church', 9),
(360014, 'Why is the doctrine of the Holy Spirit essential for Christian living?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is merely academic","The Spirit empowers believers for holy living and ministry","It has no practical application","It only matters for theologians"]', 'The Spirit empowers believers for holy living and ministry', 10),
(360014, 'Discuss how the Holy Spirit''s work in regeneration, sanctification, and empowerment shapes the Christian life.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The Holy Spirit regenerates believers, progressively sanctifies them, and empowers them for ministry and witness', 11);

(360014, 'Discuss how the Holy Spirit''s work in regeneration, sanctification, and empowerment shapes the Christian life.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The Holy Spirit regenerates believers, progressively sanctifies them, and empowers them for ministry and witness', 11);
